title: Remove Loan Section Letter Document Type from Frontend

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' document type from the frontend, including the type definition, built-in template, and UI selector
acceptanceCriteria: 'Loan Section Letter' no longer appears in the document type dropdown/selector in FormSection
The built-in template definition for Loan Section Letter is removed from frontend/src/lib/templates/getTemplate.ts
The LoanType or DocumentType enum/union in frontend/src/types/form.ts no longer includes the Loan Section Letter entry
No runtime errors occur when the application loads or when other document types are selected

file_operations.description: Remove the 'Loan Section Letter' entry from the LoanType or DocumentType type definition. If it's defined as a union type, remove the literal string 'Loan Section Letter'. If it's an enum, remove the corresponding enum member. Ensure no other document types are affected.

Remove the built-in template definition for 'Loan Section Letter' from the DOCUMENT_TEMPLATES object or similar data structure. Remove any associated template body text, headline, or default Template object for this document type. Verify that other loan types (home, education, personal, business, vehicle) and their templates remain intact.

Remove 'Loan Section Letter' from the document type selector/dropdown UI component. This may involve removing an option from a select element, radio group, or similar control. Ensure the component still renders correctly with the remaining document types and that no references to 'Loan Section Letter' remain in labels, placeholders, or error messages.
